violations.text: Cheese was observed held at 61 degrees Fahrenheit in the lowboy cooler at the food prep/assembly line. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC items were placed in the unit 3 hours prior to inspection and moved to the walk-in cooler to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The lowboy cooler located in the food prep/assembly area was not in good repair. The unit was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 63 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was taken out of service at the time of inspection and is to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the shelf of the food prep table. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
